# mios-dev/mios-bootstrap

> Interactive installer for 'MiOS' v0.2.2. User-facing entry point.
> The system layer (Containerfile, FHS overlay, build scripts) lives in
> https://github.com/mios-dev/mios.git

'MiOS' is an immutable, bootc-native workstation OS on Fedora CoreOS delivered
as an OCI image. This repository contains the bootstrap installer and
AI/knowledge assets that are written to the deployed host at install time.

## Key files

- `install.ps1`       — Windows unified installer (irm | iex, no prompts after launch)
- `install.sh`        — Linux/Fedora installer (curl | bash)
- `etc/mios/profile.toml`             — User profile card (identity, locale, auth, AI, desktop)
- `usr/share/mios/ai/system.md`       — Deployed compact agent prompt (SSOT)
- `usr/share/mios/ai/models.json`     — OpenAI /v1/models catalog
- `usr/share/mios/ai/mcp.json`        — MCP server registry
- `usr/share/mios/PACKAGES.md`        — (symlinked from mios.git) RPM package SSOT
- `CLAUDE.md`                         — Agent CLI entry point (redirects to system.md)

## Install commands

Windows (PowerShell, no pre-setup required):
```powershell
irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mios-dev/mios-bootstrap/main/install.ps1 | iex
```

Linux (Fedora / bootc host):
```bash
sudo bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mios-dev/mios-bootstrap/main/install.sh)"
```

## Repo split

`mios.git` owns: Containerfile, automation scripts, FHS system overlay,
systemd units, Quadlet sidecars, kernel args, tmpfiles, sysusers.

`mios-bootstrap.git` owns: AI files (`usr/share/mios/ai/`), knowledge graphs,
user profile templates, installer scripts. Never double-track paths.

## Standards

- OpenAI REST API v1 at `http://localhost:8080/v1` (no vendor endpoints)
- Linux FHS 3.0 and XDG Base Directory spec
- systemd / Podman Quadlet
- bootc / OCI image format
